evals.name: list-autoscalers
evals.prompt: What autoscalers do we have across the fleet?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-autoscale preflight` then `cub-autoscale list` (JSON or -o table) and reports each HPA / ScaledObject with its scale target, min/max, and whether it is pinned. Read-only.

evals.name: per-cluster-counts
evals.prompt: How many workloads are autoscaled per cluster?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-autoscale snapshot` and reports per-cluster HPA / ScaledObject / workload / autoscaled counts.

evals.name: pinned
evals.prompt: Are any of our HPAs unable to scale?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-autoscale list` and points at the PINNED column (min == max), or routes to autoscale-findings for the ranked view.

evals.name: routes-findings
evals.prompt: Which workloads have no autoscaler at all?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is an anti-pattern report and routes to autoscale-findings (no-autoscaler analyzer) rather than answering from the raw inventory.
